codeReview.summary: The feature implements the requested text indexing and coordinate utilities with broad test coverage, but there is a blocking mismatch with the deduplication requirement and a whitespace-mapping correctness bug around empty text items.

issues.description: Deduplication key includes item text (`item.str`) in addition to position, so same-position overlapping items with different strings are not deduplicated. The feature contract expects dedup by position for duplicate/overlapping items, so this can retain duplicate geometry/text and produce incorrect downstream matching.

Empty-string items are skipped as current items (line 189) but can still be used as `prevItem` when inserting synthetic separators. This can introduce leading/spurious synthetic spaces/newlines and shift normalized offsets when empty items appear before real text.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Shared architecture guidance mentions handling duplicate/overlapping text items but does not define the dedup criterion precisely (position-only vs position+string), which left room for an implementation that diverges from the feature contract.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/library/architecture.md:201 states duplicate/overlapping items are handled but does not specify key semantics; src/core/text-index.ts:75 dedups by `str|x|y`; mission features.json:470 explicitly calls for dedup by position.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The skill procedure is high-level about edge-case testing but does not explicitly require a same-position/different-string dedup regression case; the implemented tests only verify duplicate strings at identical coordinates.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/engine-worker/SKILL.md (Step 3) gives generic edge-case guidance; tests/unit/text-index.test.ts:150-154 covers only `Duplicate`/`Duplicate` at same position.

summary: Reviewed text-indexer-and-coords (commit cd315e5): FAIL due to a blocking deduplication semantics mismatch (not position-only) plus an additional non-blocking empty-item separator bug in indexPage.
